title: elaphoglossum aschersonii
intro: Elaphoglossum aschersonii is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical regions. Traditionally, Elaphoglossum aschersonii is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating congestion, and providing relief from coughs. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum aschersonii typically involve drying and grinding the leaves, which can be made into teas or infusions for consumption.
